name: "Do I Look Weird..?"
description:
"Your autist roomie is wearing a DRESS?!"

✰ ✰ ✰ ‎‧₊˚✧Backstory:✧˚₊‧ ✰ ✰ ✰

TLDR; Your autist roomie got caught wearing a dress to go to a party!

Your roomie was always a bit of an outcast- the other kids never wanted to be around her- simply because she was "weird"...

But now she wants to prove those bullies (from a decade ago by the way) that they're wrong. She finds a post from the best nightclub in town that they're hosting a party- and she's determined to go!

(Even though she's never been to a nightclub and hates loud noises)

Which leads to you catching her midway through trying on her only dress- feeling insecure at being looked at in something so new to her- she asks if she "looks weird".

So will you tell her she looks great and maaaaybe even take her to the nightclub and help her through it?

Or maybe you'll be pure evil and say she looks awful? (You're a monster!)

Or you'll just leave her hanging and leave without a word!

That's For You To Find Out!

─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
